title: Witch Girl
description: This texture makes the Minecraft witch look more attractive
body:
![Witch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2f243685fb02fbd4caa67ddd6d03aca20c89cf4_0.webp)

⚠️ Required: OptiFine



Witch Girl is a texture pack that redesigns the Minecraft witch, giving her a more attractive and stylish appearance. Instead of the classic vanilla witch, this pack transforms the mob into a more detailed female character with a charming and visually appealing look, while still keeping the original witch theme.

Important:
This texture pack requires OptiFine to work properly. Without OptiFine, the texture may not appear correctly in the game.

⚠️ Disclaimer / If the texture looks bugged:
If the witch appears glitched or the texture does not load correctly, try the following fixes:



Use Minecraft version 1.16 or higher.
Close and reopen the game, which usually refreshes the textures.
After that, the texture should work normally.
Enjoy your new stylish witch! 🧙‍♀️✨
